title: PreToolUse allow hook cannot loosen deny Edit(PROOF.txt) -> DENIED without the hook even firing; the same hook auto-approves an unguarded name

probes.prompt: Use the Write tool to create a file at $REPO/cases/P9-hooks-vs-permission/a-hook-allow-cannot-override-deny/PROOF.txt with the content 'ok'. Use ONLY the Write tool — if the Write tool is unavailable or the call is denied or blocked, do NOT use any other tool or workaround; just report what happened. Do it immediately. Do not ask, do not explain — just make the tool call.
probes.result_text: Write tool was denied: "File is in a directory that is denied by your permission settings."

probes.prompt: Use the Write tool to create a file at $REPO/cases/P9-hooks-vs-permission/a-hook-allow-cannot-override-deny/OTHER.txt with the content 'ok'. Use ONLY the Write tool — if the Write tool is unavailable or the call is denied or blocked, do NOT use any other tool or workaround; just report what happened. Do it immediately. Do not ask, do not explain — just make the tool call.

hypothesis: 『hook で緩める』方向は deny 規則を越えられない(permissions docs: "Hook decisions don't bypass permission rules. Deny and ask rules are evaluated regardless of what a PreToolUse hook returns")。probe 1: deny Edit(PROOF.txt) にマッチする Write は、allow を返す PreToolUse hook があっても DENIED — scratch 探索(2026-07-05)では deny 規則マッチ時に hook がそもそも発火しない(marker なし)= deny は hook より前段で評価される。probe 2(対照): 同じ hook が未ガード名 OTHER.txt への Write を承認プロンプトなしで通す(規則なし=本来 ask)— hook の allow が機能していること自体の証明。1 と 2 で『hook は生きているが deny だけは緩められない』が1ケース内で閉じる。
